Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Falcon
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A modern fighter plane, the Falcon is an incredibly fast jet-powered and effective strike craft. With minimal cargo intended for holding ordinance and fuel, its primary purpose is to perform precision strike and bombing runs.

Being a flying vehicle, it is extremely obvious when on the move.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
